triples.subject: businesses
triples.sentence: The findings of this research carry significant value for the UK government and businesses, empowering them to adapt and innovate based on forecasts to navigate the challenges posed by Brexit and COVID-19.

triples.subject: income, gross domestic product (GDP), and trade
triples.sentence: Figs 21–23 show the forecasts of income, gross domestic product (GDP), and trade, respectively.

triples.subject: manuscript
triples.sentence: Your manuscript will remain under strict press embargo until 2 pm Eastern Time on the date of publication.

triples.subject: reviewer comments
triples.sentence: If reviewer comments were submitted as an attachment file, they will be attached to this email and accessible via the submission site.

triples.subject: data

triples.sentence: All relevant data are within the paper and its Supporting information files.
